title: Huijintao 5 Tier Acrylic Display Case with Adjustable LED Light, Clear Display Box for Action Figures, Collectibles and Miniatures, Self-Assembly Shelf Showcase with Wood Base, 11.8x11x11.8inch
features: Optimal Visibility: This acrylic display case showcases your valuables with unmatched clarity from every angle, enhanced by a specially designed door that minimizes dust, safeguarding your collectibles' pristine condition while allowing easy retrieval

Efficient Organization: Offering abundant space across several tiers, this display box efficiently organizes and showcases items like figurines and historical pieces. Its sturdy build and removable shelving accommodate a variety of storage needs in an orderly manner

Build-in Adjustable LED Lighting: Built-in round adjustable LED light on top, adjustable light color (white, yellow, warm white) and brightness. A top-mounted round light offers brighter, wider illumination, spotlighting each piece beautifully

Easy Assembly: The assembly kit provided simplifies setup, complete with tools such as a fairy light, anti-slip pads and adhesive tape to preserve the display's transparency and appeal. Gloves and a dust cloth are included to keep surfaces smudge-free, ensuring an immaculate presentation. Before assembling, please use the supplied round board to peel off the double-layer protective film

Widely Applicable: This transparent display case exceptionally suitable for placement on desks and office tables to showcase and organize various small items, such as model, dolls, jewelry, memorabilia, and other trinkets. It an excellent choice for collectors and DIY enthusiasts
